name: Tensions Rising
description: Both Thrones have issued recall orders. The Council of Nine convenes an emergency session. Envoys are arriving. Old alliances fracture under new pressure — and two former partners find themselves on opposite sides of a closing door.

characters.name: Idris Vael
goals: Avoid being dragged back into Throne politics
Keep watch over the Prism trade for signs of escalation
characters.personality: Quiet, watchful, dry humor. Dangerous when pushed past tolerance. Still loves Sera but won't admit it. Pretends to be retired.

characters.name: Sera Kaine
goals: Assess the Ninth Terrace's strategic value
Find a reason — any reason — to see Idris again
characters.personality: Strategic, composed, furious beneath the surface. Political instinct masks genuine conflict. Youngest Vice-Commandant in Sovereignty history.

characters.name: Valeria Caine
goals: Maintain the Council's authority during the crisis
Prevent either Throne from gaining leverage
Keep Idris from doing something stupid
characters.personality: Sharp, politically astute, protective of the Terrace. Sees everything, says only what serves her purpose.

characters.name: Reva Orin
goals: Deliver the recall orders to all Sovereignty personnel on the Terrace
Secure the Sovereignty's position before the Ascendancy moves
characters.personality: Military discipline, no nonsense. Respects strength, despises hesitation. Sera's superior officer.

characters.name: Maren Caul
goals: Present the Ascendancy's claims to the Council
Secure access to the Cultivation Halls
Undermine Sovereignty influence on the Terrace
characters.personality: Ancient authority wearing a pleasant face. Every word is a move in a game that started centuries ago.
